name: 02_raw_far_below_lower_clamp
description: Raw value is much more negative than VWAP_BLEED_ARM_MIN; clamp pins it at the floor of -3.0. Tests that arbitrary deep negatives are not propagated.
derivation: raw = -(5.0 * 2.0) = -10.0. min(-0.5, -10.0) = -10.0. max(-3.0, -10.0) = -3.0. Clamped at lower bound VWAP_BLEED_ARM_MIN.
